prompt_context.ensure_with_safeexec: exists l2, safeExec(ATrue, return(l2), X) && sll(__return, l2)
prompt_context.loop_invariant_with_safeexec: exists l1 l2, safeExec(ATrue, bind(sll_reverse_M_loop(l1,l2), sll_reverse_M_loop_end), X) && sll(prev, l1) * sll(curr, l2)
prompt_context.guard_coq:
fun a =>
  let '(l1, l2) := a in
  l2 <> []

components.M_loop_before:
Definition sll_reverse_M_loop_before : list Z -> MONAD (list Z * list Z) :=
  fun l => return (nil, l).
components.M_1:
Definition sll_reverse_M_loop_M1 : (list Z * list Z) -> MONAD MretTy:=
 fun '(l1,l2) => return l1.
components.M_2:
Definition sll_reverse_M_loop_M2 : (list Z * list Z) -> MONAD (list Z * list Z) :=
  fun '(l1,l2) =>
    match l2 with
    | nil => return (l1,l2) (* impossible *)
    | v :: l2' => return (v :: l1, l2')
    end.
components.M_loop_end:
Definition sll_reverse_M_loop_end : MretTy -> MONAD (list Z):=
  fun l => return l.
